retrieved_result: Psychologist Salary Psychologist Salary Psychologists working in the United States generally earn salaries in the range from $40,809 to $144,845 a year including bonuses and contributions from profit sharing according to the salary information reported by Payscale. Professionals with the certification of Licensed Psych
